rawContent: Task: 874-260409-175345 | Outcome: completed | Observation: Task 874-260409-175345 completed all 7 pipeline stages with 0 retries each (~173s duration, full mode), updating PR #843. Verify stage reports FAIL due to PagesPageConfig type constraint violations (TS2344 errors in .next/dev/types/validator.ts), yet pipeline proceeds through review-fix and ship without blocking. This is the thirteenth consecutive run exhibiting the identical verify-to-ship gate flaw where verify FAIL status does not prevent automatic shipment of code that failed typecheck validation. | Pattern: This is the thirteenth consecutive run (832, 841, 260409-111824, 840, 842, 844, two 419-reruns, 847, 846, 858, 863, and now 874) exhibiting the identical verify-to-ship gate flaw: verify stage reports FAIL due to PagesPageConfig type constraint violations or test failures, yet the pipeline proceeds through review-fix and ship without blocking. Twelve prior retrospectives across two days recommended adding a verifyExitCode check in the ship stage template that halts when verify reports FAIL, but no implementation has occurred. The autofix stage cannot resolve this class of structural type errors, and the pipeline lacks a blocking mechanism at the verify-to-ship boundary. | Suggestion: Implement the verifyExitCode conditional gate in the ship stage template that was recommended in twelve prior retrospectives without implementation. This requires a configuration change to the ship stage template: add a check that reads the verify stage exit status and halts with an error when verify reports FAIL, preventing automatic shipment of code that failed typecheck validation. This is a recurring issue requiring immediate structural fix, not another observational recommendation. | Flaw: verify → ship gate — Verify stage FAIL status does not prevent pipeline progression to ship stage | Stages: taskify:completed, plan:completed, build:completed, verify:completed, review:completed, review-fix:completed, ship:completed
